video_title: Particle Physics and the Standard Model
speaker: Prof. Fabiola Gianotti

chapters.title: Elementary Particles
chapters.transcript: Quarks (up, down, charm, strange, top, bottom), leptons (electron, muon, tau, neutrinos).

chapters.title: Forces and Bosons
chapters.transcript: Photon (EM), gluon (strong), W/Z (weak), graviton (hypothetical). Feynman diagrams.

chapters.title: Quantum Chromodynamics
chapters.transcript: Color charge, confinement, asymptotic freedom. Hadrons: baryons and mesons.

chapters.title: Electroweak Unification
chapters.transcript: Glashow-Weinberg-Salam model. Higgs mechanism. Neutrino oscillations.

chapters.title: Particle Accelerators
chapters.transcript: LHC, CMS, ATLAS. Discovery of Higgs boson (2012).
